# Frontier-model allowlist

Single source of truth: [`docs/models.allowlist.yaml`](../models.allowlist.yaml). Last reviewed: **2026-05-08**.

| Model id | Provider | Family | Approved roles | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `anthropic/claude-opus-4.7` | anthropic | claude-opus | `design`, `judge`, `drift_triage`, `firewall_compose` | Default for Design and Judge in v1. |
| `anthropic/claude-opus-4.6` | anthropic | claude-opus | `design`, `judge`, `drift_triage` | Previous-generation flagship; retained for judge diversity. |
| `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6` | anthropic | claude-sonnet | `interview`, `drift_triage` | Approved for Interview where latency matters more than depth. |
| `openai/gpt-5.4` | openai | gpt-5 | `design`, `judge`, `interview` | Default for Interview in v1; eligible Judge member. |
| `openai/gpt-5.3-codex` | openai | gpt-5-codex | `design`, `judge` | Codex variant — preferred when proposing Terraform diffs. |
| `google/gemini-2.5-pro` | google | gemini-pro | `design`, `judge`, `drift_triage` | Eligible Judge member to ensure cross-lab diversity. |
